commit.message:
feat: draft CRUD, autosave, and modals-to-pages migration

- Add draftSchema (relaxed validation), updateDraft, deleteDraft, getDraftById
  server actions for full draft lifecycle
- Add getGigById server action for gig edit page
- Extract PostFormInner from CreatePostForm dialog wrapper with onFormChange,
  autoSaveStatus, and onClose props
- Extract GigFormInner from CreateGigForm for standalone page rendering
- Make EventFormWizard render inline when open/onOpenChange are undefined
- Create useAutosaveDraft hook (3s debounce, beforeunload guard, creates or
  updates drafts automatically)
- Create AutosaveIndicator component (saving/saved/error states)
- Create CreatePageHeader shared component (back button + title)
- Add dedicated pages: /c/create (with inline drafts panel), /c/[id]/edit,
  /gigs/create, /gigs/[id]/edit
- Refactor /events/create and /events/[id]/edit to page-based forms
- Replace all dialog-based creation flows with router.push navigation in
  community-tab, events-tab, and gigs-tab
- Move drafts access from community feed DraftsSheet to inline panel in
  /c/create page

commit.message:
feat: use MEFF real IV data instead of flat BS theoretical pricing

- Scrape MEFF daily bulletin for Mini IBEX Put option IVs (Mar-27 expiry)
- Interpolate IV curve from market data points (e.g. K=13800→23.9%, K=16500→17.8%, K=18000→15.5%)
- All option prices now use strike-dependent IV (ATM~16.7%, OTM~20.1%)
- Fallback to flat IV=18.5% if MEFF scraping fails
- Option chain table shows IV per strike
- Fix: operation steps now say "MEFF IV interpolated" instead of stale "IV=18.5%"
- JS recalculation also uses MEFF IV interpolation

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
fix: convert custom Discord emojis to :name: format in message content

Custom emojis were passed through as raw Discord format (<:Name:ID> /
<a:Name:ID>) which is meaningless to LLMs. Now stripped to :Name:.

fix: council.sh premature worker termination in host agent context

- Replace single wait+exit with polling loop (10s timeout intervals)
- Restore EXIT trap for orphan prevention on abnormal exits (set -e errors)
- Remove EXIT trap before normal cleanup to prevent double-stop
- Add --skip-git-repo-check to codex command for non-git directories
- Signal traps (INT/TERM/HUP) registered before host agent context check

commit.message:
feat: add Sentry monitoring (error tracking + performance)

backend/monitoring.py:
- init_sentry(settings) — FastAPI + Starlette + Logging integrations,
  traces_sample_rate configurable, send_default_pii=False
- sentry_capture_exception(exc) — safe manual capture (noop if not init)
- sentry_capture_message(msg, level) — alerts for crisis/budget events
- sentry_set_user(user_id) — user context per request
- Auto-disabled when SENTRY_DSN is empty (dev mode)

backend/api/main.py: init_sentry() called at lifespan startup
backend/api/middleware.py: sentry_capture_exception() on unhandled exceptions
settings.py: add sentry_dsn + sentry_traces_sample_rate fields
.env.example: add SENTRY_DSN + SENTRY_TRACES_SAMPLE_RATE (commented)
requirements.txt: add sentry-sdk[fastapi]>=2.19.0

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat: implement local patient onboarding questionnaire and form engine

Replace Axon-dependent patient onboarding with local form engine that
keeps PHI in the patient-chart vault. Questionnaire runs locally with
14 questions across 4 sections (consent, identity, health history,
preferences). Data router splits answers: PHI to vault, non-PHI to
CANS.md, lightweight enrollment to Axon (non-fatal).

- Add patient_onboarding.json questionnaire definition
- Add PatientFormEngine with show_when, hard_stop, validation, cans_field
- Add DataRouter for PHI/CANS/network data split
- Add PatientLLMClient for guided-mode questions via Anthropic API
- Update CANS generator with configurable preferences
- Rewrite PatientOnboarding to use form engine + data router
- Add /careagent_test command for E2E testing with Elizabeth Anderson data
- Add vault-empty detection in /careagent_on
- 638 tests passing

classes across App.js, PokemonDashboard, PokemonComparison, PokemonCard, and
PokemonSelect with semantic token classes (e.g. text-pokemon-dark, bg-pokemon-red).

Also removes Arial font-family overrides in Dashboard and Comparison, letting
the system font stack from index.css apply globally (JEF-81).

Fixes the radar stroke bug in PokemonDashboard (#4393c3 → COLORS.blue).

* JEF-82: feat: add directional symbols to stat difference column

Replace color-only signaling in the comparison table diff column with
directional symbols so colorblind users have a non-color indicator:
- Positive: ▲ +12 (+5.3%)
- Negative: ▼ -8 (-3.1%)
- Neutral:  = 0

Also fixes the total row not handling the zero-diff case (was always
showing red instead of neutral).

commit.message:
Add Pop Culture APIs — MCU theme (17 exercises, IDs 1033-1049)

Seventh theme in the Pop Culture APIs collection featuring MCU-inspired
parody data with many-to-many hero-team relationships via teamIds[].

Datasets: 12 heroes (Tony Stank, Steve Dodgers, Sore Oddinson, etc.)
and 6 teams (The Avenguards, Guardians of the Grocery, The X-Mentos,
The Fantastick Four, The Defendurrs, Agents of S.H.E.L.F.).

Key differentiator: heroes belong to multiple teams via teamIds array,
enabling .includes(), .some(), and reverse-lookup cross-referencing.

- T2 (6): Hero names, aliases, active filter, team names, powers, origin filter
- T3 (7): Top movie stars, team roster, hero teams, multi-team heroes,
          avg team stats, heroes by team type, most powerful
- T4 (4): Team report, power census, origin analysis, full MCU database

Edge cases: Fantastick Four has 0 members (avgPower: 0), T'Challah
apostrophe handling, Clint Bartender on 3 teams (max membership).

Collection total: 118 exercises (7 themes). Platform total: 1,044.

- DashboardPage: Maghrib setTimeout activates laylah-mode without page reload

- useHalaqah: staleTime on leaderboard prevents stale flash on tab focus
- useGeolocation: hasCoords as state + clearLocation exposed from hook
- PrayerPage: use clearLocation from hook instead of direct lib call

commit.message:
feat: implement profile key sync and avatar fetching

Profile keys are required to fetch contact avatars from Signal servers.
This commit adds functionality to:

1. Sync profile keys from presage store to local database
2. Automatically fetch and cache contact avatars on startup
3. Update conversations with avatar paths

Changes:
- profiles.rs: Add sync_contact_profile_keys() to populate profile keys
- manager.rs: Call profile key sync on QueueEmpty event (startup)
- manager.rs: Trigger avatar sync after profile keys are populated

Technical details:
- Profile keys (32 bytes) are required to decrypt avatar data
- Avatars are fetched via retrieve_profile_avatar_by_uuid()
- Downloaded avatars are saved to ~/Library/Application Support/org.signal-tauri.Signal/avatars/
- Avatar paths are stored in contacts table and propagated to conversations

Fixes missing avatar issue where contacts showed colored circles with
initials instead of actual profile pictures.

commit.message:
feat: Stage 5 — ESP-NOW local mesh + WLED cooperative arbitration

Add ESP-NOW mesh for bot-to-bot discovery and cooperative WLED access:

- New esp_now_mesh.h: 24-byte state broadcast every 3s, 10-peer cache,
  scan burst on CMD_MESH_SCAN, 15s stale eviction
- WLED coordination: text/speech DDP defers when a mesh peer is active,
  retries each poll cycle until peer finishes (no dropped messages)
- Deferred say: bot delays LCD speech bubble + WLED until peer's WLED
  display completes, preserving command ordering
- Keep AP alive in STA+AP mode after linger (ESP-NOW needs AP interface)
- Report meshPeers count in cloud sync state
- Remove Bliss expression (was index 17), shift remaining indices

which was reached unconditionally. Moving it to fetchRaw after the mock check
ensures mock fallback always succeeds regardless of keyword format.

commit.message:
Fix Fuse.js word-order sensitivity with permutation search

Fuse.js matches character sequences, so "gray sky" matched
"Graystone" instead of "Sky Gray". Now tries all word permutations
(up to 4 words) and picks the best result. Tested:
  gray sky → Sky Gray, blue baby → Baby Blue,
  red brick → Brick Red, olive dark green → Dark Olive Green

commit.message:
fix: Map LGA name matching — resolve GeoJSON/election data mismatches

The Map page showed blank LGAs because:
1. GeoJSON uses `adm2_name` but code looked for `lga_name`/`ADM2_EN`/`NAME_2`
2. Inconsistent hyphenation between data sources (80 mismatches)
3. Spelling differences between GeoJSON and election data (31 mismatches)

Added normalization (collapse hyphens/slashes/spaces, strip parentheticals)
and a 31-entry alias map to resolve all 774 LGAs with zero unmatched.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
fix: remediate Round 4 security audit FAILs (promo double-discount, unprotected promo endpoint, webhook race condition)

- Fix #7: Remove promo discount double-application in create-payment-intent.
  parsedAmount is already client-discounted and server-verified; no second
  subtraction needed. Hoist serverGrossCents for correct logging/metadata.
- Fix #14: Add PROXY_KEY enforcement and CF-level rate limiting
  (PROMO_VALIDATION_CF) to validate-promo-code Cloud Function. Forward
  x-proxy-key from Next.js proxy. Defense in depth against direct CF access.
- Fix #15: Replace non-atomic get()+set() webhook idempotency check with
  db.runTransaction(). Transaction returns decision object; downstream
  fulfillment gated on decision. Eliminates race window between webhook
  and finalize-order.

Audit verdict: GO (18 PASS, 7 WARN, 0 FAIL)
